scores.correctness_notes: Covers all gold standard points: juju.integrate(), juju.remove_relation(), wait for active, AppStatusRelation fields (related_app, interface, scope), cli fallback with show-unit. Also correctly mentions endpoint syntax and adds valid extra detail.
